c. Reaffirming the universality, indivisibility, interdependence 
and interrelatedness of all human rights and fundamental 
freedoms and the need for persons with disabilities to be 
guaranteed their full enjoyment without discrimination….”
ARTICLE 1 – PURPOSE
“The purpose of the present Convention is to promote, 
protect and ensure the full and equal enjoyment of all 
human rights and fundamental freedoms by all persons with 
disabilities, and to promote respect for their inherent dignity.
Persons with disabilities include those who have long-
term physical, mental, intellectual or sensory impairments 
which in interaction with various barriers may hinder their 
full and effective participation in society on an equal basis 
with others.”
ARTICLE 5 – EQUALITY AND NON-DISCRIMINATION
States Parties recognize that all persons are equal
